name: ELECTRO SENSORS INC
summary: Electro-Sensors, Inc. (ESI) manufactures and sells industrial production monitoring and process control systems. Products include speed monitoring systems, temperature sensors, vibration monitors, belt alignment monitors, tilt switches, and hazard monitoring systems (Electro-Sentry and HazardPRO). ESI serves industries including grain/feed/milling, bulk materials, food products, ethanol, and power generation. The company sells domestically and internationally through internal sales teams, manufacturers' representatives, and distributors, shipping to 21 countries in 2025.

products.name: Speed Monitoring Systems
products.description: Monitors RPM and production rates; includes alarms, tachometers, and closed-loop PID drive control systems.

products.name: Temperature Application Products
products.description: Sensors for bearing, gear box, and motor temperature monitoring with configurable alert thresholds.

products.name: Position Application Products
products.description: Includes belt alignment monitor and slide gate position monitor for plant operations.

products.name: Vibration Monitoring Products
products.description: Alerts operators when machine vibration exceeds or falls below specified levels.

products.name: Tilt Switches
products.description: Alerts operators when a storage bin or production system reaches a certain capacity.

products.name: Electro-Sentry 1 TM
products.description: Integrated hazard monitoring system combining temperature, belt alignment, and shaft speed sensors with programmable control logic.

products.name: Electro-Sentry 16 TM
products.description: Larger integrated hazard monitoring system with programmable control logic for material handling systems.

products.name: HazardPRO TM
products.description: Wireless hazard monitoring system with site system manager software; approved for use in hazardous dust environments.

partnerships.description: Sales agreement granting ESI the right to distribute Motrona control and interface devices in the United States.
